goal: clean and audit datasets for chemistry and chemical-engineering education document structure parsing plus science education content understanding
chemistry_keep_signals: element, compound, ion, solution, gas, precipitate, oxidation, reduction, acid, base, salt
laboratory apparatus, reagent, procedure, observation, safety note
chemical engineering concept such as separation, distillation, reactor, process flow, material balance
drop_criteria: not related to chemistry, chemical engineering, science experiment, or science education
missing image/page/question text required by the dataset task
duplicate page or near-duplicate question after normalization
unreadable scan, severe occlusion, or broken image/PDF
annotation cannot be mapped to any target schema field
license or source does not allow research reuse

keep: chemistry-related scientific article or handout-like pages if present
pages with usable region bounding boxes or layout labels
cleaning_actions: filter by subject equals Chemistry where metadata exists
filter document type to textbook and test paper as first priority
map native layout classes to target_region_labels
retain image path, page id, document type, subject, split, native labels, normalized labels, bbox or polygon
flag labels that are too coarse for question stem, option, answer, or experiment-step extraction
limitations: labels may be coarse and may not distinguish stem, choices, analysis, answer, experiment purpose, steps, and observations
mostly a layout dataset, not a fine-grained chemistry reasoning dataset

keep: questions tagged or inferred as Chemistry
questions with choice list and answer index
records with image context, text context, lecture, or solution when available
cleaning_actions: normalize question text, choices, answer index, subject/topic/category, hint, lecture, solution, image path, split
convert each record to question_choice_answer_explanation_json
derive chemistry topic tags using metadata first and keyword fallback second
deduplicate by normalized question and choices
limitations: already structured and not suitable for OCR page-layout training
mostly English K-12 science and not a Chinese chemistry exam corpus

keep: questions tagged or inferred as Chemistry
high-school to college-entrance science questions with image context when available
records with choices, answers, knowledge points, and detailed explanations
cleaning_actions: normalize question text, choices, answer, explanation, knowledge points, image references, and split
tag chemistry concepts from subject/topic metadata, knowledge-point fields, and content keywords
convert each valid record to question_choice_answer_explanation_json
drop records with missing choices, invalid answers, broken image references, or no chemistry relevance
limitations: not a dedicated chemistry lab handout parsing dataset
covers multiple science subjects and must be filtered before chemistry/chemical-engineering use

keep: Chinese middle-school, high-school, vocational, or college chemistry exam pages
pages with complete question blocks and visible options or answer areas
pages that can be annotated for question stem, choices, figure, formula, table, and answer area
cleaning_actions: remove pages with personal information or copyright-problematic redistribution risk
split PDF into page images and assign stable page ids
deduplicate by perceptual hash and normalized OCR text
annotate 500 to 2000 high-value pages with fine-grained education layout regions
reserve a Chinese-only test set from different sources and years
limitations: requires manual collection, licensing review, OCR quality control, and annotation
no public ground truth until the project creates it

keep: lab safety sheets and apparatus diagrams
pages containing purpose, principle, reagents, apparatus, steps, observations, conclusion, or precautions
cleaning_actions: split documents into page images and preserve source document id
deduplicate templates and repeated school handouts
annotate experiment purpose, principle, reagents, apparatus, steps, observation, conclusion, safety note, and answer areas
extract experiment names and map to curriculum concepts
separate instruction text from student-fillable answer/report regions
limitations: public datasets do not directly cover this fine-grained Chinese lab-handout structure
manual annotation is the core value of the task
